title: rosa elliptica var. liostyla
intro: Rosa elliptica var. liostyla, also known as the fragrant rose, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its fragrant and delicate flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin issues. The health benefits of Rosa elliptica var. liostyla include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
